creator: raj@csub.edu
text:
On 12/04/2010 08:10 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of deskutils/wyrd,
>
> Please note that PR ports/152834 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/152834
>

I approve the patch.

I don't use this software anymore. The submitter may take over maintainership if desired.

-- 
Russell A. Jackson <raj@csub.edu>
Network Analyst
California State University, Bakersfield
